channel.title: Agent Economy
channel.description: Curated news and insights about AI agents and the autonomous economy | 关于 AI 智能体经济的精选洞察

item.title: Design UI using AI with Stitch from Google Labs | Google Labs 发布 Stitch：用 AI 设计 UI
item.description: Stitch is evolving into an AI-native platform that allows anyone to create, iterate, and collaborate on high-fidelity UI. / Stitch 正在演进为 AI 原生平台，让任何人都能创建、迭代并协作打造高保真 UI。

item.title: Introducing Forge | Mistral AI | Mistral AI 发布 Forge：企业专有知识驱动的前沿模型系统
item.description: Today, we’re introducing Forge, a system that allows enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in their proprietary knowledge. / Mistral AI 发布 Forge，让企业基于专有知识构建前沿级 AI 模型。

item.title: Claude Now Creates Interactive Visuals Directly in Chat | Claude 现可直接在对话中生成交互式可视化内容
item.description: Claude now creates interactive charts and diagrams directly in chat. This beta feature lets users explain concepts or analyze data with custom visuals—no coding required. Based on last fall's Imagine… / Claude 推出对话内嵌可视化功能，可直接生成交互式图表和示意图。该测试版源自去年预览的 Imagine with Claude，用户无需编程即可解释概念或分析数据。

item.title: The 2028 Global Intelligence Crisis: A Bearish Scenario for AI Optimism | 2028年全球智能危机：AI 乐观主义的熊市情景
item.description: CitriniResearch scenario analysis explores economic risks of rapid AI development: unemployment hits 10.2%, "Ghost GDP", SaaS industry collapse... / CitriniResearch 发布情景分析，探讨 AI 快速发展可能带来的经济风险：失业率飙升至 10.2%、"幽灵 GDP"、SaaS 行业崩溃...

item.title: Jack Dorsey Announces Major Block Layoffs: Reducing from 10,000 to 6,000 Employees | Jack Dorsey 宣布 Block 大规模裁员：从 10,000 人减至 6,000 人
item.description: Block founder Jack Dorsey announces the company will reduce workforce by nearly 50%, from over 10,000 to approximately 6,000 employees. Over 4,000 people will be affected... / Block 创始人 Jack Dorsey 宣布公司将裁员近 50%，从超过 10,000 名员工减少至约 6,000 人。超过 4,000 名员工将受到影响...

item.title: Google Releases Nano Banana 2: Next-Gen Image Model Combining Pro Capabilities with Lightning Speed | Google 发布 Nano Banana 2：结合 Pro 能力与闪电速度的新一代图像模型
item.description: Google DeepMind releases Nano Banana 2, combining Pro features with Flash speed. Supports subject consistency, precise text rendering, 4K resolution... / Google DeepMind 发布 Nano Banana 2，将 Pro 版本的高级功能与 Flash 的闪电速度相结合。支持主体一致性、精确文本渲染、4K 分辨率...

item.title: Google Releases Gemini 3.1 Pro: Next-Gen Multimodal Reasoning Model | Google 发布 Gemini 3.1 Pro：新一代多模态推理模型
item.description: Google DeepMind releases Gemini 3.1 Pro, leading on benchmarks including Humanity's Last Exam, ARC-AGI-2, and SWE-Bench... / Google DeepMind 发布 Gemini 3.1 Pro，在 Humanity's Last Exam、ARC-AGI-2、SWE-Bench 等多项基准测试中领先...

item.title: Figma: The Future of Design is Code and Canvas | Figma：设计的未来是代码与画布
item.description: Figma introduces Claude Code to Figma, allowing developers to convert code directly into editable designs... / Figma 推出 Claude Code to Figma 功能，让开发者可以直接将代码转换为可编辑的设计稿...

item.title: RynnBrain: Alibaba's Open Embodied Foundation Model | RynnBrain：阿里巴巴开源具身智能基础模型
item.description: Alibaba DAMO Academy releases RynnBrain, an embodied foundation model grounded in physical reality... / 阿里巴巴达摩院发布 RynnBrain，一个基于物理现实的具身基础模型...

item.title: Entire: A Collaboration Platform for Agents and Humans | Entire：智能体与人类的协作平台
item.description: Entire is going beyond repositories, building a developer platform where agents and humans can collaborate, interact, and grow. / Entire 正在超越代码仓库，构建一个开发者平台，让智能体和人类能够协作、互动和成长。

item.title: AI Hires Humans: A New Paradigm in the Agent Economy | AI 雇佣人类：智能体经济的新范式
item.description: Rent a Human introduces a disruptive concept where AI agents hire humans for physical tasks... / Rent a Human 提出颠覆性概念：AI 智能体雇佣人类完成物理任务...

item.title: Google Announced Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) | Google 发布 Agent Payments Protocol (AP2)
item.description: Google announced AP2, an open protocol built on A2A that enables secure payment transactions between AI agents... / Google 发布 AP2 协议，一个建立在 A2A 之上的开放标准，支持 AI 智能体之间的安全支付交易...

item.title: Google Introduces A2A Protocol: A New Era of Agent Interoperability | Google 推出 A2A 协议：智能体互操作的新时代
item.description: Google announces A2A open protocol enabling agents from different frameworks and vendors to collaborate... / Google 宣布 A2A 开放协议，让不同框架和供应商的智能体能够协作...

item.title: Anthropic Introduces Model Context Protocol (MCP) | Anthropic 发布 Model Context Protocol (MCP)
item.description: Anthropic open-sources MCP, an open standard connecting AI assistants to data systems... / Anthropic 开源 MCP，一个连接 AI 助手与数据系统的开放标准...
